title: Template — identity from FLUX.2 reference images (no trained LoRA)
_note: Copy this dir, mint a 2-4 image reference sheet into character/<name>/refs/, point character_refs at it, rewrite the shots. Identity is locked by the references, not a trigger word. See README 'Identity without a trained LoRA'.
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, warm cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: a cheerful young woman with long dark hair, wearing a mustard-yellow knit sweater

shots.line: Hey everyone! Today I'm trying the thing the whole internet is obsessed with.
shots.image_prompt: sitting at a cozy desk holding a coffee mug, soft window light, friendly direct-to-camera expression, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she sips her coffee and smiles warmly to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: First, you gather everything you need. It's honestly so simple.
shots.image_prompt: a tidy desk flat-lay with a notebook, a steaming coffee mug and a small plant, warm morning light, top-down shot
shots.motion_prompt: steam rises gently from the mug, a page of the notebook lifting slightly in a breeze, calm coherent motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: quiet cozy room ambience with soft morning birdsong outside

shots.line: Okay... I did not expect it to actually work. Look at this!
shots.image_prompt: leaning toward the camera with a delighted surprised expression and one hand raised, at the cozy desk, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she leans in with a delighted surprised expression and a small laugh, lively coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Follow for more. I'll see you in the next one!
shots.image_prompt: waving goodbye cheerfully at the cozy desk with a big warm smile, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye cheerfully and smiles, warm gentle coherent natural motion
